description: Style Note Wear this kurta to work or for traditional family functions. With variety and style on their side, span kurtas fulfil the ethnic requirements of your wardrobe. Colourful with a contemporary edge, you can wear these kurtas with contrasting leggings or churidars and ethnic sandals for an easy traditional look.Product Details Multi coloured sleeveless kurta, has a round neckline with lace detailing, purple panel and embroidered red panel at the yoke with a decorative button and side slits Material and Care 100% cotton Dry clean onlySize and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
